docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY WONG, JEANIE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, MICHELE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE, "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL/DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JEANIE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, MICHELE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINITFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
